# API reference

<!-- SKELETON: outline only. Pages below are auto-generated from docstrings
     via mkdocstrings. They require `shakermaker` (and its compiled
     `shakermaker.core` extension) to be importable at build time. -->

The reference is generated directly from the package docstrings.

| Page | Covers |
|---|---|
| [ShakerMaker engine](shakermaker.md) | `ShakerMaker`, the simulation driver |
| [CrustModel](crustmodel.md) | `CrustModel` + `cm_library` presets |
| [Sources](sources.md) | `PointSource`, `FaultSource` |
| [Source time functions](stf.md) | `Brune`, `Gaussian`, `Dirac`, `Discrete`, `SRF2` |
| [Receivers](receivers.md) | `Station`, `StationList`, `DRMBox`, `SurfaceGrid`, `PointCloudDRMReceiver` |
| [Writers](writers.md) | `StationListWriter`, `HDF5StationListWriter`, `DRMHDF5StationListWriter` |
| [FFSP](ffsp.md) | `FFSPSource` |
| [SW4 export](sw4.md) | SW4 exporter |
| [Plotting](plotting.md) | `ZENTPlot`, `StationPlot`, `SourcePlot` |
